subcodes.title: Ziyarat li-Hurufi’l-‘isma
subcodes.first_line: Verily, the most exalted of essences and the loftiest of ornaments, which first dawned and then shone resplendently, casting its radiance from the precincts.. [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الملک الحق المبین. و ان اعلی جواهر جوهریة و اعلی طرائز طرزیة التی اشرقت و الاحت ثم اشرقت و ضیائت من ساحة
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @prayer for protection, @suffering and imprisonment
